headline: Crude Falls 3% on US-Iran Talks Progress

article.title: Oil Declines After US-Iran Peace Talks Show Signs of Progress
article.summary: Oil dropped following signs of progress in peace talks between Washington and Tehran, which appeared to get off to a rocky start after US President Donald Trump issued a fresh threat against Iran.

headline: EasyJet Rejects 3 Castlelake Bids Amid Sector Turmoil

article.title: Castlelake Says Three Separate Offers to EasyJet Were Rebuffed
article.summary: EasyJet Plc has rejected three separate offers from Castlelake, with the investment firm saying it made the most recent proposal over the weekend as a deadline to commit or walk away draws to a close.

headline: Inception Labs AI Surpasses Google, Gains 30% Market Share

headline: Fed Hikes Won't Sink 8-Year Bull Run
